violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine in the back storage room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

The floor in the hawk nest area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to either repair or replace the portion of floor that is separating from sub-floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2025
